title: cephalocarpus polyphyllus
intro: Cephalocarpus polyphyllus, also known as the Nepalese alder or Himalayan alder, is a species of flowering plant in the family Podocarpaceae. It has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, which are beneficial for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Cephalocarpus polyphyllus include its ability to reduce inflammation, fight off infections, and promote wound healing. The plant is typically prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be consumed for its medicinal and health benefits.
